_meta.name: Email Event Trigger (Outlook)
_meta.description: Outlook OnNewEmailV3 trigger with folder, subject, and importance filters. Use for flows that react to incoming emails.

placeholders.{{IMPORTANCE}}: Email importance filter: Any, High, Normal, Low (optional)
placeholders.{{CONN_REF_LOGICAL}}: Connection reference logical name for Office 365 connector

_notes.folder_id: Use 'Inbox' for the default inbox, or a folder path like 'Inbox/Subfolder'.
_notes.polling: Email triggers poll at intervals: Free plan = 15 min, Office 365 = 5 min.
_notes.body_access: Access email body via @triggerOutputs()?['body/body'], subject via @triggerOutputs()?['body/subject'].
_notes.attachments: When fetchOnlyWithAttachment is true, only emails with attachments trigger the flow.
